case_title: WEI ZHONG SHAUN YUEN VS. 121 9TH STREET/788 MINNA STREET OWNERS' ASSOCIATION

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO EPIC REAL ESTATE, INC. - EUGENIA MANTZOROS
SUBPOENA RETURNED AND FILED -AS TO JUSTIN BISHOP
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$50.00) SERVED OCT-19-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT 121 9TH STREET/788 MINNA STREET HOA
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REMARK:RETURN MAIL DEC-07-2022, CONTINUE ORDER MAIL TO 121 9TH STREET/778 MINNA STREET HOA, ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN UNABLE TO FORWARD.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-29-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-30-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WEI ZHONG SHAUN YUEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT 121 9TH STREET/788 MINNA STREE OWNERS' ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY CHRISTOPHE THIBAULT (SECRETARY OF HOA & HOMEOWNER). PLAINTIFF SUBPOENA WITNESSES EPIC REAL ESTATE, INC. - EUGENIA MANTZOROS (COO) AND JUSTIN BISHOP (FORMER TENANT AND FRIEND OF PLAINTIFF) ARE BOTH PRESENT. COURT REVISED DEFENDANT NAME TO "121 9TH STREET/788 MINNA STREET HOA". PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $1,600.00 (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. PAYMENT TO BE MADE BY CHECK OR CREDIT ON A LEDGER TO MR. YUEN'S ACCOUNT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE DECEMBER 30, 2022 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-30-2022 - CONTINUED ON COURTS OWN MOTION TO MAR-01-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE MAR-13-2023 ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION MAIL TO PLAINTIFF(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS UNABLE TO FORWARD)
